title: Fix login page timeout issue
description: Users are experiencing session timeouts after 5 minutes of inactivity on the login page, even when the 'Remember me' option is selected. The expected behavior is that the session should persist for 30 days when this option is checked. This affects all browsers and was introduced in release 2.4.1.

title: Implement dark mode support
description: As a user, I want to be able to switch between light and dark themes in the application settings so that I can reduce eye strain when working in low-light environments. The theme preference should be persisted across sessions and applied consistently across all pages.

title: Migrate database from SQL Server 2016 to SQL Server 2022
description: The current SQL Server 2016 instance is reaching end-of-support in July 2026. We need to plan and execute a migration to SQL Server 2022 to ensure continued security updates and support. The migration must include schema validation, data integrity checks, and a rollback plan.

title: Add export to CSV feature in reports module
description: Users need the ability to export report data to CSV format directly from the reports dashboard. The export should respect the current filters and date range applied by the user, include column headers, and handle large datasets (up to 100,000 rows) without causing browser or server timeouts.

title: CI/CD pipeline fails on pull request validation step
description: The Azure Pipelines build for the main repository is intermittently failing at the unit test stage during PR validation. The error message is 'Unable to connect to test agent'. This has been occurring since the pipeline agent pool was updated last week and is blocking developers from merging changes.
